name: Sheresh Dome Stewards
summary: Steward-administrators who keep dome life functioning through maintenance law, heat discipline, and communal survival procedure.
motive: Keep domes alive first, comfortable second, and politically stable throughout crisis.
power_relations: Primary visible civic authority in Sheresh, but constantly negotiating with researchers and route wardens
visible_membership_base: Stewards, repair marshals, screening officers, communal administrators.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Their authority is strongest in emergencies, but repeated emergencies make every order feel personal.
